---
title: "Blog"
description: "Essays and analysis on public policy, technology, and geopolitics"
listing:
  - id: blog-list
    contents:
      - "*.qmd"
      - blog.yml
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 15
    feed:
      title: "Pranay Kotasthane — Blog"
      description: "Essays on public policy, technology, and geopolitics"
      items: 20
---

Essays on public policy, technology, and geopolitics. Posts link to the original publication on the Takshashila Institution website.

```{=html}
<a href="index.xml" class="btn btn-outline-primary rss-btn" target="_blank">
  <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" style="margin-right:6px;vertical-align:-2px"><path d="M2 0a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V2a2 2 0 0 0-2-2zm1.5 2.5c5.523 0 10 4.477 10 10a1 1 0 1 1-2 0 8 8 0 0 0-8-8 1 1 0 0 1 0-2m0 4a6 6 0 0 1 6 6 1 1 0 1 1-2 0 4 4 0 0 0-4-4 1 1 0 0 1 0-2m.5 7a1.5 1.5 0 1 1 0-3 1.5 1.5 0 0 1 0 3"/></svg>
  Subscribe via RSS
</a>
```

::: {#blog-list}
:::
